item.title: 代理可以在几毫秒内思考，而传统基础设施则不然。 LinkedIn、沃尔玛和 Zendesk 分享了他们如何在 VB Transform 2026 上缩小差距
item.summary: Legacy infrastructure, not the models themselves, is what's actually slowing AI agents down. That was the shared conclusion of three infrastructure leaders — from LinkedIn, Walmart, and Zendesk — at VB Transform 2026 . The panel brought together Animesh Singh, senior director of AI platform and infrastructure at Linked
